prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain recalibration for the 2AR-FXE 2.5L Atkinson-cycle I4 + electric motor (152 hp + 143 hp combined) via HKS Hyper Max IV GT ECU reflash, optimizing torque split for 0-60 mph in 7.8s (stock: 8.7s) while maintaining 42 MPG efficiency

Garrett GT2252S turbocharger upgrade with custom 3D-printed titanium compressor housing for the 2AR-FXE, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft and AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor to achieve 280 whp at 6,200 RPM (stock: 200 whp) without voiding hybrid battery warranty

Tein Flex Z coilovers with custom valving for the AH30 chassis, featuring 32-way adjustable damping and 20mm front/15mm rear lowering, paired with Cusco 22mm front/18mm rear sway bars and Whiteline front strut tower brace (PN: KSB727) for reduced body roll in high-speed lane changes
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Alphard AH30-specific, not generic SUV fitment) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom 3-piece overfenders to accommodate 21x9.5 ET22 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels with 265/35R21 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Seibon Carbon fiber roof replacement (OEM-spec fitment, 40% weight reduction) with custom matte clear coat and integrated Toyota emblem delete, paired with Varis Japan front lip spoiler and rear diffuser (Alphard AH30-specific, not Camry/RAV4 parts)

Custom interior retrim with Recaro SP-G TS (Alphard-specific mounting brackets) in Alcantara/red stitching, paired with Bride Ergo-Mesh seat rails, Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses (hybrid battery-safe mounting), and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub (Toyota Safety Sense-compatible)
